title: pisum transcaucasicum
intro: Pisum transcaucasicum, a lesser-known species within the genus Pisum, is a type of flowering plant commonly referred to as a wild or garden pea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Pisum transcaucasicum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pisum transcaucasicum can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to support overall health and wellness.
